# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a GitLab CI pipeline with multiple stages where build artifacts are passed between jobs. The build job creates artifacts (binaries, configs) and deployment jobs download and execute them. Store artifacts for 30 days for team access.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - build
  - test
  - deploy-staging
  - deploy-production

variables:
  ARTIFACT_EXPIRE: "30 days"
  BUILD_DIR: "build"
  CONFIG_DIR: "config"

build-application:
  stage: build
  image: node:18-alpine
  script:
    - echo "Building application..."
    - mkdir -p ${BUILD_DIR}
    - mkdir -p ${CONFIG_DIR}
    - npm install
    - npm run build
    - cp -r dist/* ${BUILD_DIR}/
    - echo "Creating binaries..."
    - npm run package
    - mv app-binary ${BUILD_DIR}/app-binary
    - chmod +x ${BUILD_DIR}/app-binary
    - echo "Generating configuration files..."
    - echo "APP_VERSION=$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S)" > ${CONFIG_DIR}/app.conf
    - echo "BUILD_NUMBER=${CI_PIPELINE_ID}" >> ${CONFIG_DIR}/app.conf
    - echo "COMMIT_SHA=${CI_COMMIT_SHA}" >> ${CONFIG_DIR}/app.conf
    - cp configs/production.yml ${CONFIG_DIR}/
    - cp configs/staging.yml ${CONFIG_DIR}/
    - echo "Build completed successfully"
  artifacts:
    name: "build-${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME}-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}"
    expire_in: ${ARTIFACT_EXPIRE}
    paths:
      - ${BUILD_DIR}/
      - ${CONFIG_DIR}/
    reports:
      dotenv: ${CONFIG_DIR}/app.conf

build-docker-image:
  stage: build
  image: docker:24-alpine
  services:
    - docker:24-dind
  script:
    - echo "Building Docker image..."
    - docker build -t app:${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA} .
    - docker save app:${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA} -o docker-image.tar
    - gzip docker-image.tar
  artifacts:
    name: "docker-image-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}"
    expire_in: ${ARTIFACT_EXPIRE}
    paths:
      - docker-image.tar.gz

compile-native:
  stage: build
  image: gcc:12
  script:
    - echo "Compiling native components..."
    - mkdir -p ${BUILD_DIR}/native
    - gcc -O2 -o ${BUILD_DIR}/native/processor src/native/processor.c
    - gcc -O2 -o ${BUILD_DIR}/native/converter src/native/converter.c
    - strip ${BUILD_DIR}/native/*
  artifacts:
    name: "native-binaries-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}"
    expire_in: ${ARTIFACT_EXPIRE}
    paths:
      - ${BUILD_DIR}/native/

generate-documentation:
  stage: build
  image: python:3.11-slim
  script:
    - pip install sphinx sphinx-rtd-theme
    - mkdir -p ${BUILD_DIR}/docs
    - sphinx-build -b html docs/source ${BUILD_DIR}/docs
    - tar -czf documentation.tar.gz -C ${BUILD_DIR}/docs .
  artifacts:
    name: "documentation-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}"
    expire_in: ${ARTIFACT_EXPIRE}
    paths:
      - documentation.tar.gz
      - ${BUILD_DIR}/docs/

unit-tests:
  stage: test
  image: node:18-alpine
  dependencies:
    - build-application
  script:
    - echo "Running unit tests with built artifacts..."
    - ls -la ${BUILD_DIR}/
    - npm install
    - npm run test:unit
    - echo "Unit tests completed"
  artifacts:
    name: "test-results-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}"
    expire_in: ${ARTIFACT_EXPIRE}
    when: always
    paths:
      - test-results/
    reports:
      junit: test-results/junit.xml

integration-tests:
  stage: test
  image: node:18-alpine
  dependencies:
    - build-application
    - compile-native
  script:
    - echo "Running integration tests..."
    - ls -la ${BUILD_DIR}/
    - ls -la ${BUILD_DIR}/native/
    - export PATH="${BUILD_DIR}/native:${PATH}"
    - npm install
    - npm run test:integration
  artifacts:
    name: "integration-results-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}"
    expire_in: ${ARTIFACT_EXPIRE}
    when: always
    paths:
      - integration-results/

deploy-staging:
  stage: deploy-staging
  image: alpine:3.18
  dependencies:
    - build-application
    - compile-native
  before_script:
    - apk add --no-cache openssh-client rsync
    - eval $(ssh-agent -s)
    - echo "$SSH_PRIVATE_KEY" | tr -d '\r' | ssh-add -
    - mkdir -p ~/.ssh
    - chmod 700 ~/.ssh
    - ssh-keyscan ${STAGING_SERVER} >> ~/.ssh/known_hosts
  script:
    - echo "Deploying to staging environment..."
    - echo "Using configuration from artifacts..."
    - cat ${CONFIG_DIR}/app.conf
    - cat ${CONFIG_DIR}/staging.yml
    - echo "Transferring binaries to staging server..."
    - rsync -avz --delete ${BUILD_DIR}/ ${STAGING_USER}@${STAGING_SERVER}:/opt/app/
    - rsync -avz ${CONFIG_DIR}/staging.yml ${STAGING_USER}@${STAGING_SERVER}:/opt/app/config.yml
    - rsync -avz ${CONFIG_DIR}/app.conf ${STAGING_USER}@${STAGING_SERVER}:/opt/app/
    - echo "Executing deployment script on staging..."
    - ssh ${STAGING_USER}@${STAGING_SERVER} "cd /opt/app && chmod +x app-binary && ./deploy-staging.sh"
    - echo "Staging deployment completed"
  environment:
    name: staging
    url: https://staging.example.com
  only:
    - develop

deploy-staging-docker:
  stage: deploy-staging
  image: docker:24-alpine
  services:
    - docker:24-dind
  dependencies:
    - build-docker-image
  script:
    - echo "Deploying Docker image to staging..."
    - gunzip docker-image.tar.gz
    - docker load -i docker-image.tar
    - docker tag app:${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA} registry.example.com/app:staging
    - echo ${REGISTRY_PASSWORD} | docker login -u ${REGISTRY_USER} --password-stdin registry.example.com
    - docker push registry.example.com/app:staging
    - echo "Docker image deployed to staging registry"
  environment:
    name: staging-docker
  only:
    - develop

smoke-tests-staging:
  stage: deploy-staging
  image: curlimages/curl:8.1.2
  dependencies:
    - build-application
  script:
    - echo "Running smoke tests on staging..."
    - sleep 10
    - curl -f https://staging.example.com/health || exit 1
    - curl -f https://staging.example.com/api/status || exit 1
    - echo "Smoke tests passed"
  needs:
    - deploy-staging
  only:
    - develop

deploy-production:
  stage: deploy-production
  image: alpine:3.18
  dependencies:
    - build-application
    - compile-native
    - generate-documentation
  before_script:
    - apk add --no-cache openssh-client rsync
    - eval $(ssh-agent -s)
    - echo "$SSH_PRIVATE_KEY_PROD" | tr -d '\r' | ssh-add -
    - mkdir -p ~/.ssh
    - chmod 700 ~/.ssh
    - ssh-keyscan ${PRODUCTION_SERVER} >> ~/.ssh/known_hosts
  script:
    - echo "Deploying to production environment..."
    - echo "Using production configuration..."
    - cat ${CONFIG_DIR}/app.conf
    - cat ${CONFIG_DIR}/production.yml
    - echo "Creating backup of current deployment..."
    - ssh ${PRODUCTION_USER}@${PRODUCTION_SERVER} "tar -czf /backup/app-backup-$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S).tar.gz -C /opt/app ."
    - echo "Transferring binaries to production servers..."
    - rsync -avz --delete ${BUILD_DIR}/ ${PRODUCTION_USER}@${PRODUCTION_SERVER}:/opt/app/
    - rsync -avz ${CONFIG_DIR}/production.yml ${PRODUCTION_USER}@${PRODUCTION_SERVER}:/opt/app/config.yml
    - rsync -avz ${CONFIG_DIR}/app.conf ${PRODUCTION_USER}@${PRODUCTION_SERVER}:/opt/app/
    - tar -xzf documentation.tar.gz -C /tmp/docs
    - rsync -avz /tmp/docs/ ${PRODUCTION_USER}@${PRODUCTION_SERVER}:/var/www/docs/
    - echo "Setting permissions..."
    - ssh ${PRODUCTION_USER}@${PRODUCTION_SERVER} "cd /opt/app && chmod +x app-binary && chmod +x native/*"
    - echo "Executing deployment script on production..."
    - ssh ${PRODUCTION_USER}@${PRODUCTION_SERVER} "cd /opt/app && ./deploy-production.sh"
    - echo "Production deployment completed"
  environment:
    name: production
    url: https://production.example.com
  when: manual
  only:
    - main
    - tags

deploy-production-docker:
  stage: deploy-production
  image: docker:24-alpine
  services:
    - docker:24-dind
  dependencies:
    - build-docker-image
  script:
    - echo "Deploying Docker image to production..."
    - gunzip docker-image.tar.gz
    - docker load -i docker-image.tar
    - docker tag app:${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA} registry.example.com/app:${CI_COMMIT_TAG:-latest}
    - docker tag app:${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA} registry.example.com/app:production
    - echo ${REGISTRY_PASSWORD} | docker login -u ${REGISTRY_USER} --password-stdin registry.example.com
    - docker push registry.example.com/app:${CI_COMMIT_TAG:-latest}
    - docker push registry.example.com/app:production
    - echo "Docker image deployed to production registry"
  environment:
    name: production-docker
  when: manual
  only:
    - main
    - tags

smoke-tests-production:
  stage: deploy-production
  image: curlimages/curl:8.1.2
  dependencies:
    - build-application
  script:
    - echo "Running smoke tests on production..."
    - sleep 10
    - curl -f https://production.example.com/health || exit 1
    - curl -f https://production.example.com/api/status || exit 1
    - echo "Production smoke tests passed"
  needs:
    - deploy-production
  only:
    - main
    - tags
